name: claude-sessions-notify
description: Polls fleet sessions for state transitions, ceiling breaches, and tool-level events; dispatches notifications via desktop / bell / fifo / slack per ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/projects/<KEY>/notify/config.toml.

name: claude-sessions-web
description: Per-project HTTP dashboard server. Hash-based port assignment under ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/projects/<KEY>/web/config.toml; PID lock + stand-by polling so multiple Claude Code sessions in the same project coordinate cleanly. Discovery via `claude-sessions web` (no args) which prints the URL.
